studies.risk_class: Risk Class I according to MDR
studies.duration_additional_info: Outcomes are measured at the individual starting point (T0) and after three months (T1).
studies.intervention_and_control_group: Intervention group: Rehappy app users; Control group: Waiting control group.
studies.additional_info_about_trial_arms: Arm 1 (Intervention): Patients use the Rehappy app in their daily living, which provides feedback on physical activity, hints and information on medical backgrounds, administrative topics, activities of daily living, and individually tailored motivational messages. Arm 2 (Control): Waiting control group.
studies.collected_data: Post-stroke depression (PHQ-2), activity and participation (IMET), adherence to therapy, adherence to medication (MMAS-8), Health Literacy (HLS-EU-Q16), Self-Efficacy (ASKU), Health Related Quality of Life (SOEP-SF12v2), amount of recurrent strokes, physical and mental health, activity and mobility, age, gender, and health behavior.

audit.study_title: Effect of individual motivation and information for the recovery of stroke patients
audit.note: registry-only: outcome measures captured under collected_data; no reported results
